svg.text: ForeBlocks-DARTS: differentiable architecture search for multivariate time-series forecasting
jointly searchable normalisation · hierarchical mixed operations (16 ops × 4 families) · topology mode (enc-dec / enc-only / dec-only) · bi-level optimisation with five regularisers

g.text: look-back L · channels C · horizon H
DARTS cell DAG · mixed operation per edge
ô_e = ∑_k p_e,k · o_k(x) — soft / DrNAS Dir / GDAS straight-through

svg.text: |O| = 16 cell operations · hierarchical group × op factorisation p_e,k = π_g(α_G) · q_g,k

g.text: each λ_i weights one inductive bias
retained iff p_e > θ — else → Identity
topology mode m · cell count K · width d_h
early-stopping of poor candidates dominates GPU time
MAE / MSE / sMAPE reported per dataset
argmax norm / mode / bridge / pos applied as hard choice
